title: Liu et al. 2025 — Lower limb motor imagery EEG dataset based on the multi-paradigm and longitudinal-training of stroke patients (Tianjin University)
description: This dataset comprises scalp electroencephalography recordings from 27 stroke patients performing lower-limb motor imagery tasks as part of a longitudinal rehabilitation training protocol. The multi-paradigm design supports research on motor-imagery brain–computer interfaces for gait and lower-limb rehabilitation following stroke, with repeated sessions enabling investigation of learning and neuroplastic changes over time.
methods_description: Scalp EEG recordings were acquired during a lower-limb motor imagery task (task-imagery) using a multi-paradigm protocol with longitudinal training design in stroke patients undergoing rehabilitation. Data are organized in BIDS format with 27 participants.
